name: Grit Wave
explanation: A gritty digital wavetable polysynth in the Waldorf Microwave lineage. Sister to the smooth Wave Storm but harsher and more aliased: an 8-frame wavetable (built at init, from near-sine up to bright formant-heavy frames) is scanned by Position; the signature Scan sweeps that position with an LFO so the timbre morphs on a single held note; and Drive adds saturation plus digital grain for the characterful edge. 8-voice poly through a resonant two-pole low-pass. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Position (wavetable frame), Scan (LFO sweep speed and depth), Drive (grit) and Level.
